summary: Ceraxia CodeBrigade has a working greenfield pipeline with contracts, role modules, templates, verification, review, reports, memory, injectable model guidance, replayable model guidance for deterministic contract tests, coordinated file-set synthesis for source/test sets, mandatory module-by-module synthesis contracts, executable module synthesis, first-class test module contracts, stale-test rejection for source-only model output, task-derived behavior marker validation for generated tests, verification-driven module synthesis repair, semantic/domain/artifact quality gates for generated source/tests, scenario-plan review for user workflows, plus multi-module API, data pipeline, frontend, local-agent, operations-dashboard, and full executor model-synthesis integration trials. Greenfield success now requires accepted per-module model synthesis instead of quietly passing on templates when the model is unavailable. A live model trial harness exists; live trials exposed stale-test failure modes that are now covered by contract validation, and a follow-up no-replay local-model CLI trial reached accepted status with source/test synthesis, verification, review, and model ledger all passing. The remaining risk is depth: curated templates/features still provide the reliable baseline source, and arbitrary large project code synthesis needs broader live model-backed real-world trials before this objective is complete.

evidence: greenfield_project_brief.schema.json requires project metadata, stack, entrypoints, expected_files, artifact_contract, workspace_policy, definition_of_done, implementation_trace, verification_plan, and dependency_plan
greenfield_project.py validate_greenfield_project_brief enforces the runtime contract
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_brief_schema_tracks_runtime_contract covers schema/runtime sync
requirements.remaining_risk: Schema is still permissive with additionalProperties=true for forward compatibility.

evidence: greenfield_architect.py owns project type inference, template selection, stack, architecture_plan, file_tree_plan, module_contracts, implementation_plan, implementation_trace, and verification_plan
architecture_plan.json, file_tree_plan.json, module_contracts.json, implementation_trace.json, and verification_plan.json are attached as project artifacts
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_architect_owns_project_brief_and_plan covers the role boundary
requirements.remaining_risk: Stack selection is deterministic with short LLM guidance, not yet a fully exploratory architect for unknown domains.

evidence: greenfield_scaffold_worker.py normalizes paths, writes directories/files, enforces .ceraxia_greenfield_workspace, and blocks unowned nonempty workspaces
greenfield_templates.py provides templates for Python CLI/API/library, Node/Vite, static site, Telegram bot, data tool, and local agent tool
focused_self_test.py covers scaffold writes and unowned workspace blocking
requirements.remaining_risk: Android is intentionally not implemented yet; objective text says Android is later/heavier.

evidence: greenfield_implementation_worker.py owns build_implementation_worker_plan and build_implementation_trace as a separate role module

greenfield_architect.py delegates module_sequence, milestones, synthesis_policy, per-module code_synthesis_contract, anti_stub_policy, source_files, test_files, and model guidance into GreenfieldImplementationWorker

greenfield_implementation_worker.py execute_file_set_synthesis_contract can apply a coordinated model-generated source/test file set after validating allowed paths, requirements, placeholders, and workspace boundaries

greenfield_implementation_worker.py execute_module_synthesis_contracts calls the GreenfieldImplementationWorker model path per module and writes source only after JSON, path, requirement, test, placeholder, and workspace validation

greenfield_project.py execute_greenfield_project_brief accepts an injected guidance provider and passes it through architect, file-set synthesis, module synthesis, verification repair, and review instead of forcing a global model singleton
greenfield_project.py model_synthesis_blockers prevents greenfield success when per-module model synthesis is unavailable, rejected, blocked, skipped, or applies no module implementations

greenfield_templates.py declares tests as first-class module_contracts for baseline greenfield templates, so model synthesis must treat generated tests as owned implementation work instead of passive scaffold files

greenfield_implementation_worker.py source_to_paired_tests and validate_file_set_synthesis_output reject coordinated file-set model output when a changed source file omits its paired tests, preventing stale template tests from surviving source behavior changes
greenfield_implementation_worker.py task_behavior_markers and module_required_behavior_markers make explicit user-visible literals such as printed CLI output part of generated test validation
greenfield_implementation_worker.py generated_file_quality rejects weak generated Python source and assertionless generated tests before writing model output
greenfield_implementation_worker.py domain_specific_quality_findings adds template-aware checks for FastAPI, frontend, Telegram bot, data processing, and local agent tool outputs

greenfield_review_worker.py artifact_review_greenfield_project blocks assertionless tests, unreferenced frontend assets, unwired FastAPI routes, unwired local-agent modules, and disconnected data pipeline CLIs
greenfield_implementation_worker.py paired_tests_for_module keeps module requirement traces tied to direct, keyword, or workflow tests instead of every project test
greenfield_scenario_worker.py builds scenario_plan rows from task-derived acceptance features and GreenfieldReview blocks missing behavior markers
greenfield_verification_worker.py can call verification_repair module synthesis with failure context when bounded template repair is not applicable

greenfield_feature_worker.py applies task-derived feature implementations for calculator, todo, kanban board frontend, notes API, issue tracker API, CSV summary, sales analytics pipeline, local agent tool, Telegram bot, Vite counter, and text utils library
focused_self_test.py test_project_creation_sales_analytics_pipeline_implements_multi_workflow_feature verifies a five-module data project with load/filter/group/report/CLI workflows
focused_self_test.py test_project_creation_issue_tracker_api_implements_multi_workflow_feature verifies a five-module API service with domain/store/routes/app/tests workflows

focused_self_test.py test_project_creation_operations_dashboard_api_implements_long_form_multi_workflow_feature verifies a seven-module operations dashboard API with domain/store/metrics/events/routes/app/tests workflows

focused_self_test.py test_project_creation_kanban_board_frontend_implements_multi_workflow_feature verifies a multi-file static frontend with state/render/app modules, filters, metrics, persistence, and workflow tests
focused_self_test.py test_project_creation_local_agent_tool_implements_command_router_feature verifies a multi-module local-agent tool with registry/schema/session/runner/CLI workflow tests

focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_executor_uses_injected_model_for_full_synthesis_path verifies the full greenfield executor route with model-generated source/test files, module synthesis, verification, review, reports, and model guidance ledger

focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_file_set_synthesis_rejects_source_without_paired_tests reproduces and blocks the live-trial stale-test gap where model-generated source changed behavior but tests remained scaffold-stale

focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_module_synthesis_rejects_stale_test_behavior_marker reproduces and blocks the live-trial case where a generated test file was rewritten but still asserted the old template value instead of the user-requested output
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_brief_contract_and_templates verifies every baseline template test file is present in module_contracts and implementation_plan.module_sequence
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_executor_blocks_when_model_synthesis_is_unavailable verifies that a dead model cannot produce a successful greenfield run through template fallback

greenfield_live_trial.py accepted a no-replay local-model Python CLI run after stale-test and behavior-marker validation fixes: file_set_synthesis=applied, module_synthesis=applied for core/cli/tests, verification=passed, review=passed, ledger=complete
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_implementation_trace_uses_precise_workflow_tests proves multi-module source contracts pair with the relevant workflow test
implementation_trace.json records requirement to file/function/test mapping with synthesis_contract_kind and GreenfieldReview checks it
requirements.remaining_risk: Implementation now has executable validated LLM file-set synthesis, mandatory module synthesis, first-class test contracts, stale-test rejection, task behavior marker validation, verification-driven synthesis repair, semantic/domain/artifact quality gates, scenario scoring, full executor model-synthesis coverage, one accepted no-replay live-model CLI trial, and API/data/frontend/local-agent plus long-form operations dashboard integration trials. Arbitrary large code synthesis still needs broader successful live model-backed real-world synthesis trials.

evidence: greenfield_dependency_worker.py reads stack dependency_plan, checks package manager availability, records manifests with ecosystem/sha/status, blocks unsafe install paths, records lockfile snapshots, and reports blockers
focused_self_test.py covers Node manifest recording and workspace escape install blocking
requirements.remaining_risk: Install execution remains explicit/allowlisted by design; default behavior records manifests without installing.

evidence: greenfield_verification_worker.py runs verification, calls GreenfieldRepairWorker guidance, applies bounded repairs, reruns, and records stop_condition_evidence
focused_self_test.py covers missing template file repair and repeated failure stop condition
requirements.remaining_risk: Repair execution is intentionally bounded to missing generated files and README command repair; deeper semantic repair is still future work.

evidence: greenfield_review_worker.py checks expected files, README run/test commands, entrypoints, dependency status, verification status, module contracts, placeholders, source/test presence, and implementation_trace
greenfield_review_worker.py includes scenario_review from greenfield_scenario_worker.py and blocks projects whose declared workflows lack source/test evidence
greenfield_review_worker.py includes artifact_review_greenfield_project for cross-file launch/test/module wiring checks
focused_self_test.py covers placeholder blocking and semantic review status
requirements.remaining_risk: Generated artifact meaning is checked by contract, semantic, domain, scenario, and artifact-wiring heuristics, not a deep domain-specific reviewer for every possible application.

evidence: greenfield_templates.py registers python_cli_basic, python_fastapi_service, python_library, node_vite_app, static_site, telegram_bot_python, data_processing_tool, and local_agent_tool
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_brief_contract_and_templates validates the full template set
requirements.remaining_risk: Templates are intentionally compact; larger domain templates should be added as Ceraxia learns.

evidence: greenfield_architect.py request_greenfield_model_guidance calls model_brain for GreenfieldArchitect and GreenfieldImplementationWorker
greenfield_implementation_worker.py emits per-module code_synthesis_contract objects that define model_request, JSON output fields, validation_gates, and rollback_scope
greenfield_project.py executes a GreenfieldImplementationWorker coordinated file-set synthesis stage and records greenfield_file_set_synthesis_report.json
greenfield_project.py executes GreenfieldImplementationWorker module synthesis before dependency and verification, and records greenfield_module_synthesis_report.json

greenfield_project.py, greenfield_architect.py, and greenfield_review_worker.py accept injected model guidance so the same full pipeline can be tested with deterministic model answers and run with the real model provider in production
greenfield_project.py build_greenfield_replay_guidance_provider provides an explicit recorded-guidance path for tests without making production silently succeed when the real model is unavailable
greenfield_project.py model_synthesis_blockers makes accepted per-module model synthesis a required success gate

greenfield_architect.py greenfield_model_runtime_defaults gives ImplementationWorker and RepairWorker longer timeouts, larger max tokens, and larger context windows than planning/review roles so real local model code synthesis is not forced through short planning defaults

greenfield_live_trial.py runs a real no-replay greenfield trial against the configured OpenAI-compatible model endpoint and writes compact synthesis, verification, review, and ledger status for debugging
greenfield_verification_worker.py passes verification failure signatures and results into GreenfieldImplementationWorker synthesis repair
greenfield_review_worker.py calls model guidance for GreenfieldReviewer
greenfield_verification_worker.py calls model guidance for GreenfieldRepairWorker
greenfield_project.py writes greenfield_model_guidance_ledger.json so each run records role, stage, and guidance status

focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_executor_uses_injected_model_for_full_synthesis_path proves a model-provided file-set and per-module implementation can pass executor verification, GreenfieldReview, reports, and ledger checks
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_model_runtime_defaults_allow_code_synthesis_latency_and_tokens covers the longer runtime defaults for implementation synthesis
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_live_trial_compact_result_exposes_model_synthesis_status covers the live-trial report shape used to diagnose real model failures
focused_self_test.py test_greenfield_project_executor_blocks_when_model_synthesis_is_unavailable proves template fallback no longer masks a dead model

greenfield_live_trial.py accepted a no-replay local-model CLI run with GreenfieldArchitect, GreenfieldImplementationWorker file-set synthesis, GreenfieldImplementationWorker module synthesis, and GreenfieldReviewer all recorded in the model guidance ledger
requirements.remaining_risk: LLM file-set and module code generation are executable through the full greenfield executor and validated with semantic/domain quality gates, and successful greenfield runs require accepted module synthesis. One no-replay live model CLI trial is accepted; the system still needs broader live real-world scenario coverage before it can rely on arbitrary synthesis as the primary implementation path.

evidence: greenfield_memory_worker.py records stack, dependencies, verification, stop evidence, repaired files, review status, acceptance features, scenario status, and reusable learnings
greenfield_project.py writes greenfield_memory_record.json and greenfield_run_report.json after each run
focused_self_test.py and Ceraxia self tests verify report artifacts
requirements.remaining_risk: Memory is file-based per run; no long-term retrieval/ranking layer is implemented yet.

next_recommended_work: Run broader live no-replay greenfield trials for FastAPI, static/Vite frontend, data pipeline, and local-agent templates and require source, tests, verification, review, and model ledger to pass together.
Add deeper RepairWorker behavior for semantic verification failures instead of only missing files and README command repairs.
Decide whether Android/game templates belong in this goal now or should remain explicitly deferred.
